metadata.title: Quick 3v1 Site Hold with Smart Angles in VALORANT
metadata.description:
Watch this intense 3v1 hold where positioning and timing make all the difference. See how quick decisions turn the round around. What’s your favorite site to defend?

Share your best clutch moments in the comments!

#shorts #valorant #gaming #fps #valorantclips
